word: G3424 - μογιλάλος - mogilálos - mog-il-al'-os - Having an impediment in his speech

sections.paragraph: Short Definition: Having an impediment in his speech

μογιλάλος - mogilalos - mog-il-al'-os

From G3425 and G2980; hardly talking, that is, dumb (tongue tied): - having an impediment in his speech.
